    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Workspace
    JsonFileStorage.loadWorkspaceData()
    Loads the workspace data either from an external file if present, or from the bundled resource otherwise.
    Methods in auxiliaries with parameters of type Workspace
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    JsonFileStorage.saveWorkspaceData(Workspace workspace)
    Serializes the given Workspace into a JSON representation and writes it to the specified file path.

    Method
    Description
    Workspace
    AppController.getWorkspace()
    Returns the Workspace data observed by the Workspace Page.

    Requests a new title for the given workspace.
